title: V1.0 leftovers: generator registry assertions, batch caps, dependabot governance exemption
goal: Close every leftover registered in the V1.0 release-readiness report: unblock the three lowcode real-flow smoke failures (stale backend/modules path assertions after the module-path move + un-i18n-synced wizard label), fix the SecurityEventList deferred query commit, cap batch id lists on the four audit batch endpoints, and remove the structural deadlock that made dependabot PRs unmergeable under Docs Governance.

in: sync backend_registry verification fragment and four smoke assertions to the Go import path the registry actually writes
sync generator-wizard smoke to the i18n-ized 治理面板 label
SecurityEventList commits query state synchronously like the other audit pages
cap id lists at 500 on login-log/operation-log batch delete, session batch revoke, security-event batch acknowledge
quality.yml: exempt dependabot PRs from the heavy governance-body validation (structural checks unchanged)
merge dependabot PR #188 via maintainer-authorized solo-override + rebase
out: any generator behavior change (assertion/verification strings only)
legacy Go Lint (errcheck/goconst) backlog in the non-required CI workflow
Security Gates scheduled-run backlog on main
